I manage financial risk at XP.

Every week, the team assesses the biggest risks.
This month, we are preparing answers for the regulator.
Hi Sergio, it is good to finally meet you. I am Rachel, a risk analyst at our partner bank in London.
Nice to meet you, Rachel. I am Sergio, and I manage financial risk here at XP.
Great. So, what are you working on at the moment?
Right now, I am reviewing our exposure limits and preparing a report for the regulator.
That is very useful. How does your team usually assess these risks?
We assess them every week, and we always try to mitigate the biggest exposures first.
Hi, I am Sergio. I manage financial risk here at XP.
We assess and mitigate risk every week.
I work closely with the regulator and our partner banks.
Let us schedule a meeting to discuss the numbers.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the weekly risk committee. We start at nine o'clock in the main meeting room. Today we review the market risk report, the new exposure limits, and the questions from the regulator. Each team leader presents the numbers for their desk. Please have your reports ready and share any open issues before the end of the call. Thank you, and let's have a productive meeting.

Hi Sergio, this is Rachel from the London partner bank. It was good to meet you on the call today. I'm sending you the updated exposure figures this afternoon, and I'd like to schedule a short meeting next week to discuss the numbers. Are you available on Tuesday morning? I really want to understand how your team assesses these risks. Talk soon, and have a great day.

Sergio joins the risk meeting and says good morning. He introduces himself and his role at XP. He explains that he manages financial risk. Rachel asks a question about the exposure report. Sergio answers and they agree to talk again next week.
